response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong seniority and communication skills, the resume shows insufficient depth in mandatory technical areas. C++ experience totals ~1–2 years from 2014–2015 (not the required 5–10 years), recent work focuses on TypeScript/Node.js/MongoDB rather than SQL/relational databases, and there is no demonstrated financial services or capital markets domain experience—a mandatory requirement for this role.
strengths: Senior-level seniority with 20+ years of software experience and consistent staff-level roles
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing demonstrated through workshops, talks, and open-source projects
CI/CD pipeline and infrastructure experience with Docker, GitLab CI, and deployment automation
concerns: C++ experience limited to ~1–2 years in 2014–2015 (National Instruments), far below the required 5–10 years of active C++ development
Recent 5+ years focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and MongoDB; no demonstrated recent SQL Server/Oracle or relational database expertise
No evidence of financial services, capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain experience—a mandatory requirement
